hero.title: Weekend escapes, city walks, and countryside routes — planned with local care
hero.subtitle: Browse a Moldova-first catalog of small-group experiences with clear pricing, vetted partners, and booking requests that stay organized from day one.

featured.title: Featured Moldova experiences
featured.description: Three handpicked routes to start fast — wineries, fortresses, gorges, and city walks.

how.title: How IZ Trip works
how.description: Three calm steps from inspiration to a saved request our team can act on.

step1.title: Choose a curated trip
step1.body: Filter by travel style and who is going, compare inclusions, and read day-by-day context.

step2.title: Pick your date and group size
step2.body: Select a listed departure window and tell us how many guests — we keep the request structured.

step3.title: Send the request — we confirm details
step3.body: Submit a secure request from your account. We store it safely and notify our coordinators.

categories.title: Explore by travel style
categories.description: Jump into the catalog with one tap — filters stay thumb-friendly on mobile.

categoryDescriptions.kids: Playful pacing, scavenger-style prompts, and guides who know families.
categoryDescriptions.family: Room to roam, snack breaks, and honest notes on stairs and walking time.
categoryDescriptions.adults: Wine galleries, city architecture, and grown-up storytelling.
categoryDescriptions.nature: Forest trails, river lookouts, and moderate routes with safety briefings.
categoryDescriptions.culture: Monasteries, fortresses, and village tables with context you can feel.
categoryDescriptions.weekend: Two-day loops with cozy overnight stays and relaxed mornings.
categoryDescriptions.educational: Hands-on context for schools and curious groups.
categoryDescriptions.custom: Tell us your idea — we route it through the same structured request flow.

trust.title: Why travelers trust IZ Trip
trust.description: We bias toward clarity: what you book, who it suits, and what happens next.

routes.title: Curated local routes
routes.body: Itineraries are built with guides and hosts we know — not anonymous copy-paste.

pricing.title: Clear pricing and group sizes
pricing.body: Every card shows realistic guest counts, duration, and a transparent “from” price.

requests.title: Secure account-based requests
requests.body: Booking asks live in your account history so nothing gets lost in inboxes.

family.title: Family and kids-friendly options
family.body: Pacing, rest stops, and honest difficulty notes appear across the catalog.

finalCta.title: Ready to plan your next Moldova weekend?
finalCta.description: Explore the catalog first, or create an account when you are ready to request a date.

page.title: Trips crafted for Moldova weekends
page.description: Filter by travel style and who is traveling — each route includes honest pacing notes, transparent “from” pricing, and upcoming departures.
page.statRoutesValue: North, Codrii, Chișinău, and Nistru viewpoints
page.statDatesValue: Rolling weekend dates through the season

filters.drawerDescription: Choose category and audience. Results update when you close this panel.

empty.title: No trips match these filters
empty.description: Try widening your filters to see more curated experiences.

orheiul-vechi.title: Orheiul Vechi & Râul Răut viewpoints
orheiul-vechi.shortDescription: Cliff-top monastery complex, scenic gorges, and village hospitality — Moldova’s signature cultural landscape in one relaxed day.
orheiul-vechi.description: Walk cobbled paths above the Răut River, visit the cliff monastery, and hear how centuries of monastic life shaped this region. We pace the day for photos, local food, and unhurried storytelling so you leave with context, not just snapshots.
orheiul-vechi.highlight1: Guided cliff-edge viewpoints with safe pacing and clear meeting points
orheiul-vechi.highlight2: Traditional lunch featuring seasonal Moldovan dishes
orheiul-vechi.highlight3: Small-group storytelling focused on history, faith, and daily village life
orheiul-vechi.highlight4: Comfortable transport with bottled water and rain backup plan
orheiul-vechi.included1: Licensed local guide and curated route
orheiul-vechi.included2: Round-trip transport from Chișinău meeting point
orheiul-vechi.included3: Lunch at a trusted guesthouse or restaurant partner
orheiul-vechi.included4: Museum and protected-area access fees where applicable
orheiul-vechi.included5: IZ Trip coordination and day-of guest support
orheiul-vechi.itineraryDay1Body: Morning pickup, guided walk through the archaeological complex, lunch in Butuceni, optional cellar visit add-on when schedules allow, return by early evening.

cricova-wine.title: Cricova underground wine galleries
cricova-wine.shortDescription: Drive through limestone cellars on guided electric trains, taste sparkling and still wines, and learn why Moldova is an underrated wine destination.
cricova-wine.description: This adults-focused experience pairs geology with gastronomy: kilometers of underground roads, constant cool climate, and cellars lined with bottles from decades of craft. Your guide connects history, Soviet-era anecdotes, and modern boutique labels.
cricova-wine.highlight1: Gallery train ride through limestone cellars with curated commentary
cricova-wine.highlight2: Structured tasting flight with local cheeses and bread
cricova-wine.highlight3: Photography-friendly stops in iconic “streets” named after grapes
cricova-wine.highlight4: Optional upgrade: extended vintage tasting (on request, age 18+)
cricova-wine.included1: Private IZ Trip host and winery gallery tickets
cricova-wine.included3: Guided tasting with spittoons and pacing for comfort
cricova-wine.included4: Still and sparkling pours selected with the cellar team
cricova-wine.itineraryDay1Title: Cellars, tasting, and free time in the boutique shop
cricova-wine.itineraryDay1Body: Late-morning departure, underground tour, seated tasting, time to purchase bottles at cellar prices, return before dinner.

soroca-fortress.title: Soroca Fortress & Nistru viewpoint
soroca-fortress.shortDescription: A family-friendly day at Moldova’s circular fortress, with river stories, picnic energy, and room to roam the ramparts.
soroca-fortress.description: Kids love the wide stairs and panoramic views; adults appreciate the layered history where trade routes met empires. We include breaks, snacks, and a guide who knows how to keep young travelers engaged.
soroca-fortress.highlight2: Photo stops along the Dniester/Nistru river panorama
soroca-fortress.highlight3: Picnic-style snack pack included (dietary notes on booking)
soroca-fortress.highlight4: Comfortable minibus with booster seats on request
soroca-fortress.included2: Transport from Chișinău with rest stops
soroca-fortress.included4: IZ Trip emergency contact for the travel day
soroca-fortress.itineraryDay1Title: Fortress walk, river lookout, relaxed return
soroca-fortress.itineraryDay1Body: Morning departure, guided rampart loop, lunch break in Soroca town (meal not included unless selected add-on), riverside viewpoint, return by evening.

chisinau-walking-tour.title: Old Chișinău walking tour
chisinau-walking-tour.shortDescription: Architecture, parks, and neighborhood cafés — a friendly intro to the capital with a local guide and a flexible pace.
chisinau-walking-tour.description: Trace Art Nouveau fragments, Soviet modernism, and today’s creative corners. We keep groups small so you can ask about daily life, language, and where locals actually eat after the tour.
chisinau-walking-tour.highlight3: Architecture cards to spot motifs as you walk
chisinau-walking-tour.included3: IZ Trip concierge tip sheet for dinner reservations
chisinau-walking-tour.itineraryDay1Body: Meet at the Cathedral Park area, weave through historic streets, pause for stories, optional café stop, finish near independent restaurants.

saharna-tipova.title: Saharna & Țîpova monastery trail
saharna-tipova.shortDescription: Two days of forest trails, waterfall viewpoints, and cliff monasteries overlooking the river — balanced hiking with cozy overnight.
saharna-tipova.description: Day one focuses on Saharna’s waterfall circuit; day two explores Țîpova’s rock-hewn cells. Evenings are unhurried: local dinner, early rest, and optional stargazing when skies cooperate.
saharna-tipova.highlight1: Graded hiking options for different fitness levels
saharna-tipova.highlight2: River cliff lookouts with safety briefings
saharna-tipova.highlight3: One night in a vetted guesthouse (twin rooms)
saharna-tipova.highlight4: Support vehicle for the longer transfer segments
saharna-tipova.included1: Mountain guide and monastery access coordination
saharna-tipova.included2: One breakfast, two lunches, one dinner (set menus)
saharna-tipova.included5: Transport from Chișinău with trailhead drop-offs
saharna-tipova.itineraryDay1Body: Drive from Chișinău, hike the waterfall circuit, guesthouse check-in, hearty dinner.
saharna-tipova.itineraryDay2Body: Morning transfer, cliff trail with monastery visit, lunch, return to Chișinău by evening.

weekend-nature-escape.title: Weekend nature escape (Codrii forest)
weekend-nature-escape.shortDescription: A soft-adventure weekend with ridge views, foraging stories, farm visits, and slow evenings around the fire.
weekend-nature-escape.description: Designed for families or small friend groups who want fresh air without extreme sport. Trails are moderate; guides carry first aid and adjust timing for kids.
weekend-nature-escape.highlight2: Farm visit with seasonal tasting (cheese, fruit, or honey)
weekend-nature-escape.highlight3: Optional easy kayak add-on when water levels allow
weekend-nature-escape.highlight4: One night glamping-style tents or cabins (partner site)
weekend-nature-escape.included1: Nature guide and weekend route plan
weekend-nature-escape.included2: Two lunches, one dinner, one breakfast
weekend-nature-escape.included4: Transport from Chișinău with trail snacks
weekend-nature-escape.included5: IZ Trip safety kit and backup weather routing
weekend-nature-escape.included6: Digital photo tips sheet for phone cameras
weekend-nature-escape.itineraryDay1Body: Morning pickup, ridge hike, farm visit, settle into camp/cabins, dinner.
weekend-nature-escape.itineraryDay2Body: Gentle morning loop, lunch, optional kayak, return to Chișinău.

tripDetails.bookTrustNote: No payment is taken yet — we confirm availability and details with you first.
tripDetails.metaNextDateUnknown: Ask our team for new departures

page.title: Request this trip
page.description: Tell us who is traveling and when — we save the request securely and notify our coordinators.

booking.trustPoint1: We save your request securely to your account.
booking.trustPoint2: Our team reviews availability for your preferred date.
booking.trustPoint3: No payment is taken until details are confirmed with you.
booking.afterSubmitBody: You will see an on-screen confirmation and our team monitors new requests in the booking workspace.

validation.preferredDateInvalid: Pick one of the listed departures
validation.peopleCountInvalid: Enter a valid number of guests
validation.peopleCountMin: At least one guest is required

success.title: Request received
success.description: We saved your booking request and emailed our team. Someone will follow up with you soon.
success.next1: Watch your inbox for a personal reply with availability notes.
success.next2: Review the trip page again if you want to adjust guest counts or dates.
success.next3: Browse the catalog while you wait — we can bundle nearby routes when it helps.

successWithWarning.title: Request received
successWithWarning.description: Your booking request was saved. We could not send the notification email automatically, but our team can still see it in the system and will follow up.

booking.successFullToast: Booking saved and team notified by email.
booking.emailWarningToast: Booking saved. The notification email could not be sent — our team can still see your request.
booking.submitError: Could not save your request. Check your connection and try again.

hero.title: About IZ Trip
hero.subtitle: We are an independent travel desk focused on Moldova — pairing small-group routes with transparent pricing, local partners, and organized booking requests.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.body: Help travelers explore Moldova with confidence: clear itineraries, honest pacing notes, and a booking flow that respects your time.

pillars.title: What makes IZ Trip different
pillars.lead: Four principles shape every route card, host relationship, and follow-up workflow.

pillar1.title: Local-first planning
pillar1.body: Guides, guesthouses, and cellars are relationships — not interchangeable vendors.

pillar2.title: Family and kids-friendly options
pillar2.body: We label difficulty, stairs, and driving time so families can decide quickly.

pillar3.title: Transparent pricing cues
pillar3.body: “From” pricing, guest counts, and inclusions are visible before you request a date.

pillar4.title: Secure organized requests
pillar4.body: Account-based requests stay structured for our coordinators and for your history.

audience.title: Who IZ Trip is for
audience.lead: If you value calm planning and human follow-up, you are in the right place.
audience.families: Families who want realistic pacing and snack-friendly days
audience.kids: School groups and kids clubs that need clear supervision notes
audience.friends: Friends and adults seeking wine, culture, and architecture depth
audience.weekend: Weekend explorers chasing fresh air without extreme sport

closing.title: See the catalog, then request a date
closing.body: No pressure to book instantly — explore trips, share them with your group, and reach out when the timing feels right.
